Learning that Hannah did this for the love of Ziyang, he bears a grudge against him.

On her first day at work, Putri didn't make a good impression; instead, she scolded a director at the company where she worked named Riko. Riko deliberately gave Putri a lot of work to do. When he got home, Riko was shocked to find out that the person he had been working with was Boi's daughter, a colleague of his parents who was being arranged to marry him.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 123
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Biar Ndeso Tapi Bisa Bikin Romantis
programme.desc: Dara (Andi Viola) comes from a village and is known as a hick girl. Dara comes to Jakarta to find her biological mother, but instead she meets Eza (Hardi Fadhillah). Meanwhile, Eza is apparently told by Eyang, to make Dara his wife, even though Eza has a very beautiful and fashionable girlfriend.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 577
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 71
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: SULTAN ROTI MAH BEBAS
programme.desc: Rory (Qausar Harta) is a manager at "Poetra Bakery." Rory is forced to work and love Tania because he is keeping a promise made by his friend. By chance, Rory meets Zahra (Masayu Clara), a beautiful girl who sells bread door-to-door. Their encounter begins with an argument, but eventually Rory becomes interested in Zahra's delicious bread. Rory wants to learn from Zahra how to make delicious bread.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 123
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Masa Mantan Koki Bisa Bikin Jatuh Hati
programme.desc: Siska (Ersya Aurelia) was asked by Daniel to be able to cook, because Daniel's family has a restaurant business and his mother gave a condition that Daniel's wife must be good at cooking. Siska finally asks Bobby (Kevin Hillers), her ex who is a chef and has a culinary business, for help.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 577
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: TELOLET CINTA DI ANGKOT NO 28
programme.desc: Ridwan (Naufal Samudra) is the lead singer of the band Rocker. Ridwan left home because he didn't want his mother to arrange his marriage. Ridwan also ran away from debt collectors and went to a village. One day, Ridwan disguised himself as Rimba and met Anty (Yuki Kato), a girl with a free-spirited lifestyle. Ridwan worked as a driver for Abah Bahri's minibus and lived with him, coincidentally Abah Bahri was Anty's father.

programme.title: CINTA 2 PILIHAN - EP 72
programme.desc: Fathir and Sukma are a married couple who live a simple but happy life. Until finally, their beloved daughter Zahra is diagnosed with a serious illness in the midst of their family's financial difficulties. At the same time, Fathir accidentally meets his ex-girlfriend Clara.

programme.title: Mudik Jangan Bawa Hati Nanti Sulit Kembali
programme.desc: Intan and her partner, Dodo, received a mandate, namely someone who left a luxury car in their office for 2 weeks. Then Intan and Dodo planned to take the car back home. Dodo pretended to be Intan's driver in his hometown. Intan claims to be a rich man. On the other hand, Dodo claims to be the owner of the car and flirts with girls in the village, even though Dodo is actually a car mechanic.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 124
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Asap Neng Sate Bau-Bau Cinta
programme.desc: Bintang is willing to replace Doni to be matched for money but Bintang (Eza Gionino) is surprised, because the girl who was matched with Doni his boss was Alya (Jenniver Eve) the satay seller, who has always not gotten along with him.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 578

programme.title: Yang Manis Suka Bikin Hati Meringis
programme.desc: Farel (Erdin Werdrayana) is a delivery boy, but while delivering flowers to a customer, he meets Tari (Djihan Ranti) and is stunned by her beauty. It turns out that behind it Tari is so fierce that it makes Farel surprised.

programme.title: DEWI RINDU - EP 125
programme.desc: Dewi is a girl with big dreams. She is determined to become successful and lift her family out of economic hardship. But who would have thought that her beautiful dream would be shattered and she would have to face the bitter reality of being pregnant out of wedlock.

programme.title: Mencintaimu Ibarat Hutang Makin Ditagih Makin Berbunga
programme.desc: Esih (Jennifer Eve), who has just become a debt collector, is guided by her boss Andra (Qausar Harta Yudana). At first, Esih admits she is not capable of being a debt collector. Andra then teaches her how to do the job and even gives her a hat as part of her work attribute. Eventually, Esih proves to Andra that she can handle the job, thanks to her self-defense skills.

programme.title: Samudra Cinta - EP 579
programme.desc: The love story between Ocean and Cinta, which had always quarreled before. Gradually, they became friends and slowly grew in love between them. But a secret between the Cinta family and the Samudra family makes their relationship complicated because there is a big secret about Cinta that can ruin their relationship.

programme.title: Layan Je Maharaja Lawak - EP 12
programme.desc: Sebuah program komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat S2 - EP 2
programme.desc: Dato’ AC Mizal kini Kembali Bersama geng latah seperti Eida Moin, PS Mansur, Wan Raja Lawak dan ramai lagi dalam musim terbaru Opocot Melatah Budak Pejabat.

programme.title: JOZAN - EP 11
programme.desc: Duo pelawak paling popular kini kembali setelah 7 tahun tidak bersama menghiburkan peminat menerusi program bual bicara terbaru yang pasti menghiburkan anda.

programme.title: #havocwarna - EP 25
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan yang menggabungkan sketsa, spontan, prank, zumba dan lain lain lagi.

programme.title: Kiah The Spy - EP 2
programme.desc: Kiah membina kumpulan baru untuk menguruskan perniagaan Ikan Pekasamnya,dia juga dilatih dan dilantik menjadi seorang ejen rahsia.

programme.title: Opera Sabun Boboi - EP 11
programme.desc: Pertunjukan komedi lakaran yang memaparkan kemasyhuran pelawak Dato Afdlin Shauki dan Harun Salim Bachik dari Boboi.

programme.title: Bujang 40 - EP 4
programme.desc: Bujang, 40 tahun, sepanjang hidupnya sudah beberapa kali dia gagal bercinta. Kegagalan ini antara lain disebabkan sikap ibunya yang terlalu mengongkong hidupnya. Ini membuatkan Bujang mengambil keputusan untuk terus membujang.

programme.title: Arena Panggang - EP 3
programme.desc: Bergelak tawa bersama Nabil, Johan, Dato' Afdlin, Ajak Shiro, Jihan Muse dan ramai lagi dalam program 'membahan' bersama pelawak popular. Saksikan gelagat mereka yang pasti menghiburkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 4
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa yang bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Motif Sosial? - EP 15
programme.desc: Kesinambungan Motif Viral, kali ini melalui eksperimen sosial yang viral dengan penampilan selebriti undangan.

programme.title: Rumah No 107 - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai bersama keluarga Tok K, Joey, Man, Ropie & Bibik Cha. Saksikan telatah lucu mereka bersama tetamu undangan dan cameo yang bakal mengejutkan anda sekeluarga.

programme.title: Di Balik Tawa S2 - EP 14
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara menggunakan konsep terbuka atau sesi perkongsian daripada pelawak-pelawak yang akan menceritakan pengalaman dan kisah yang mereka tidak pernah kongsi dengan masyarakat.

programme.title: Boss Kira - EP 2
programme.desc: Roy Azman, Syafa, & Haiqal, berentap sesama sendiri untuk mendapatkan hadiah lumayan dengan syarat, perlu bermain & meneka samada berat, tinggi, panjang, & harga objek di hadapan mereka.

programme.title: Rumah Memori - EP 7
programme.desc: Program ini akan menguji daya ingatan para selebriti popular tanah air sama ada mereka masih ingat akan peristiwa atau kejadian aneh & pelik yang berlaku dalam kehidupan mereka.

programme.title: Kisah Tok Kadi S2 - EP 9
programme.desc: Tok Kadi yang baru mendirikan rumah tangga kini menghadapi pelbagai cabaran dan dugaan di alam perkahwinan.dan turut diuji dengan pelbagai karenah pasangan pengantin yang ingin dinikahkan.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 10
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi Stand Up dihoskan oleh satu-satunya Douglas Lim yang menampilkan 3 lakonan setiap episod.

programme.title: Joras & Stars - EP 11
programme.desc: Joras & Stars ialah sketsa yang bersama artis jemputan setiap minggu untuk menghiburkan penonton melalui sketsa yang kelakar.

programme.title: Onyomat Geset Go - EP 8
programme.desc: 12 pelawak menjelajah Malaysia, hanya seorang juara bakal memenangi hadiah lumayan.

programme.title: Siti Ooo Som - EP 9
programme.desc: Program berbentuk permainan yang akan mempertandingkan dua kumpulan selebriti dalam pelbagai acara dan dihoskan oleh Dato' Siti Nurhaliza.

programme.title: Kalau Berani 1 vs 0 - EP 4
programme.desc: Sebuah ranangan menarik untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tanya Sama Pokok - EP 11
programme.desc: Mengisahkan tentang kehidupan di sebuah kampung moden yang sudah semakin terdedah dengan kemodenan tetapi dalam waktu yang sama masih mengekalkan ciri-ciri hidup berkampung.

programme.title: Sepahtu Reunion Live 2022 Part 2 - EP 17
programme.desc: Berhibur bersama geng Sepahtu.

programme.title: Temasya Sukan Kelaut - EP 5
programme.desc: Program sukan yang diselitkan elemen komedi dengan menampilkan barisan pelawak tanah air serta barisan selebriti sukan terkenal.

programme.title: Misi Lawak Superstar - EP 3
programme.desc: Enam peserta memasuki cabaran baharu penuh tekanan dan ketidakpastian. Perkenalan santai berubah sengit, menunjukkan kuasa perlu direbut dan digunakan bijak dalam dunia Misi Lawak Superstar.

programme.title: Legenda Puteri Qaseh - EP 9
programme.desc: Alkisah di kerajaan Kayajaya, seorang gadis kampung yang baik hati menyedari bahawa dia adalah pewaris takhta yang sah dan mesti segera mempelajari adat-istiadat untuk menjadi seorang permaisuri.

programme.title: Meja Panggang - EP 3
programme.desc: Saksikan mereka 'memanggang' para tetamu dengan soalan-soalan panas tentang kisah lampau dan peribadi mereka.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 10
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Abe Zizan Can Do It! - EP 8
programme.desc: Zizan Razak akan mencabar diri dengan melakukan aktiviti lasak dan ekstrim. Selain aktiviti ekstrim, Zizan juga dicabar untuk memasak! Berjayakah Zizan dalam melaksanakan semua cabaran?

programme.title: Gelak 90 Saat - EP 5
programme.desc: Bersama hos, Dato' AC Mizal saksikan barisan pelawak, selebriti dan influencer membuat barisan juri misteri ketawa dalam masa 90 saat! Mampukah mereka meraih wang tunai sebagai mata ganjaran?

programme.title: Dapur Bapak Bapak - EP 3
programme.desc: Dapur Bapak Bapak menghimpunkan Datuk Chef Wan, Dato’ Ramli MS dan Dato’ Jalaluddin Hassan yang berkongsi hidangan tradisi penuh rasa dan cerita di sebalik sajian.

programme.title: Muzikal Lawak Superstar Unplugged - EP 4
programme.desc: Rancangan komedi untuk tontonan semua.

programme.title: Tabung Lawak S3 - EP 4
programme.desc: Tabung Lawak ialah pelbagai klip video pendek untuk menekankan topik-topik hangat dalam cara yang lucu

programme.desc: Dapur Bapak Bapak menghimpunkan Datuk Chef Wan, Dato’ Ramli MS dan Dato’ Jalaluddin Hassan yang berkongsi hidangan tradisi penuh rasa dan cerita di sebalik sajian.

programme.title: Buka Kedai : Now In Tokyo - EP 8
programme.desc: Buka Kedai: Now in Tokyo menampilkan 4 selebriti Malaysia yang terdiri daripada Nabila Huda, Shashic, Leona dan Eric. Mereka bakal melakukan misi berniaga di Tokyo, Jepun.

programme.title: Komedi Unplugged - EP 11
programme.desc: Bual bicara berbentuk komedi membariskan artis-artis jemputan daripada kalangan pelawak, selebriti, dan juga influencer untuk berkongsi cerita dan rasa.

programme.title: Travel Lawak - EP 3
programme.desc: Sebuah program travelog yang menampilkan tiga pelawak popular iaitu Syuk, Sharif Zero dan Mamak Puteh di mana mereka akan mengembara ke luar negara dan meneroka sendiri budaya dan tempat-tempat menarik.

programme.title: Jangan Takut, Kalau Kau Takut, Aku Pun Takut
programme.desc: Tiga budak jahat pergi ke KL setelah dihalau dari rumah mereka. Ketika menumpang kereta seorang gadis, Malaika, bermulalah perjalanan dipenuhi kisah-kisah seram yang berpanjangan.

programme.title: Meja Bulat Sepahtu - EP 5
programme.desc: Sebuah program bual bicara santai yang di hos kan oleh Sepahtu dengan pelbagai topik menarik dan terkini.

programme.title: Malaysian Ghost Stories S2 - EP 12
programme.desc: Perihal adik-beradik yang mempunyai deria keenam dan cuba menyelesaikan kes-kes berkaitan dengan sihir yang mengganggu orang di sekeliling mereka.

programme.title: Bukan Cinta Sempurna - EP 5
programme.desc: Aniq risau jika kegiatan haramnya bakal dibongkar oleh Kahar. Ziyan terpandang Qistina dan mula mengekorinya. Luqman merasa gelisah apabila melihat Qistina berbual mesra dengan Ziyan.

programme.title: Kami Geng Bola - EP 21
programme.desc: Sebuah rancangan debat secara santai, komedi dan berat sebelah mengenai semua perlawanan tumpuan di liga domestic dan antarbangsa. Rancangan ini akan dihoskan oleh Dato' Afdlin Shauki.

programme.title: Pok Ya Cong Codei Memburu Siti - EP 10
programme.desc: Selepas ditinggalkan Siti, Pok Ya tidak berhasrat untuk mencarinya sehinggalah mendapat tahu Siti sedang mengandungkan anaknya. Misi menjejaki Siti semakin tegang setelah mengetahui dia sebenarnya diculik!

programme.title: Dendam Cinta Arissa - EP 22
programme.desc: Perkahwinan Arissa & Zariman musnah apabila Rafeal melanggar Zariman dan melarikan diri untuk mengejar isterinya. Ingin jujur pada Arissa namun Rafeael jatuh cinta dengan Arissa tanpa sengaja.

programme.title: Kampung Pom Pom Letops - EP 10
programme.desc: Elly Mazlein atau dikenali sebagai Kak Lina Pom Pom menjemput tetamu jemputan yang terdiri daripada duda dan jejaka idaman Malaya.

programme.title: 3 Campur 2 - EP 13
programme.desc: Kisah sebuah keluarga yang mempunyai lima adik beradik tiri. Ayahnya mempunyai tiga orang anak dan isteri baru mempunyai dua orang anak yang nakal. Timbul pelbagai konflik dan komedi dalam cerita ini.

programme.title: Nikah, Cerai, Rujuk - EP 21
programme.desc: Hanna kecil hati dengan keluarga suaminya apabila ibu mertuanya sering sahaja mencari salahnya dan Adam pula tidak cuba untuk mempertahankan dia.

programme.title: Halal Maps - EP 11
programme.desc: Menampilkan sajian kulinari seluruh dunia, Halal Maps menemui penduduk tempatan yang berkongsi hidangan Halal kegemaran di bandar mereka, di mana mendapatkannya dan bagaimana menuju ke sana.

programme.title: Dee The Series - EP 1
programme.desc: Dee bersama adik dan ibunya Amy, memulakan hidup baru di KL apabila Amy mendapat kerja baru di sebuah kolej swasta. Bermulalah satu dunia baru untuk Dee yang penuh dengan muzik, gelak ketawa dan air mata.

programme.title: Karok La Kau! - EP 5
programme.desc: Menampilkan seramai 78 orang selebriti berentap antara satu sama lain di pentas karaoke yang luar biasa.

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 5
programme.desc: Daya, Nadia dan Azri berkeputusan pulang ke resort selepas gagal mencari Jessie dan Shah. Dalam perjalanan balik, mereka terjumpa Jessie yang tangannya penuh dengan darah dan Jessie tak ingat apa terjadi.

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 6
programme.desc: Shah masih hilang, perkara ini menjadi kes polis. Keempat sekawan itu menjadi suspek, yang dikenalikan oleh Inspektor Rashidi dan jugak menganggap kumpulan kawan yang datang ke hutan untuk "party drug".

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 7
programme.desc: Selepas dihantui isu trauma dari masa silam, Azri mula menarik diri dari kawan-kawannya. Daya suspek Kai terlibat dalam kejadian pelik di resort apabila Kai bersikap defensif terhadap lelaki di dalam hutan

programme.title: Persepsi - EP 8
programme.desc: Nadia akhirnya berhadapan dengan isu perkahwinan dia. Jessie dan Azri berkeputusan mencari penyelesaian kepada isu dari masa silam mereka. Akhirnya Daya mendapat jawapan yang tak disangka tersembunyi.

programme.title: Perang Jantina - EP 8
programme.desc: Pasukan lelaki dan pasukan wanita bersaing antara satu sama lain menyelesaikan tugasan dan cabaran untuk membuktikan jantina mana yang lebih unggul.

programme.desc: A quirky comedy from the heartland of India, it touches upon a topic that is considered embarrassing for most people in India and will showcase the same in a hilariously entertaining manner.

programme.desc: The changeable weather means Rainbow has to leave before finishing his story. Sarah & Duck try to find out how the story ends.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 51
programme.desc: Benjamin can't find his favourite toy, Wonder Vole anywhere. Stanley suggests they retrace his steps but have no luck. Maybe Wonder Vole Pyjamas will help Benjamin feel brave.

programme.title: Stan Can (S1) - EP 50
programme.desc: Stanley's friends throw him a birthday party. No work for Stan today. Cynthia and Jose take a call from Amare, her tractor is stuck in the mud. Soon, so are all Stanley's vehicles.

programme.title: Number 1 Newton Avenue (S1) - EP 24
programme.desc: Freddie is making a small pond from a washing up bowl in Aunt Fee's garden She asks Freddie to fill it with a bucket, while she gets a surprise for the pond.

programme.title: JoJo & Gran Gran (S3) - EP 1
programme.desc: Four generations of JoJo's family - JoJo, Mummy, Gran Gran and Great-Gran-Gran - have a relaxing spa day together as they celebrate Mother's Day!

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 8
programme.desc: Bingo and Dad must brave a swooping magpie protecting its nest, when they go on a curry swap to Mackenzie's house through the park.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 9
programme.desc: Bluey teaches Bingo how to use magic so she can make Mum play with her, but she forgets to explain the most important rule: never use magic for cheekiness.

programme.title: Bluey (S3) - EP 10
programme.desc: Dad tries to teach Bluey how to play chess, but Mum thinks she is still too young. When Bingo joins in, the kids make up their own rules, but they still can't beat Dad.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee is playing with his train set. Choo-choo! It's amazing! The squirrels are curious and want to know all about it.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S2) - EP 13
programme.desc: When a dancing bug lands on Duggee's head, he can't stop dancing. The Squirrels see that it's a tiny hillbilly bug with a fiddle. And what's more, he's got a band with him - the Hillbilly Bug Band.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 5
programme.desc: King Tiger and the Jelly wonder what Duggee has planned for today. Tag wants a snack, Enid has a musical cheese chase, and Norrie has a haircut.

programme.title: Go Jetters (S2) - EP 27
programme.desc: Can Kyan and Foz use new compass skills to navigate their way out of an academy maze?

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 3
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits theatre, it's Potato dedicating a song to his uncle Spud, who went on a spaceship to the moon.

programme.title: Roots & Fruits (S1) - EP 2
programme.desc: Live from the Roots & Fruits Theatre, it's Strawberry, who used to be insecure, but now can't wait to celebrate herself and sing her song, See the Seeds!

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 12
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of Supertato, the world's first potato superhero as he tackles the mischievous Evil Pea, in the supermarket aisles.

programme.title: Supertato (S1) - EP 13
programme.desc: Evil Pea plunges Broccoli and Carrot into the doughnut toppings simultaneously and Supertato almost quits being a Superhero when he can't save his two friends at the same time.

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 13
programme.desc: The Squirrels haven't been making good choices round the messy clubhouse. With Duggee's help, they start to get it right. But not before sending Roly's imagination into overdrive!

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 14
programme.desc: Duggee loves to shop local, so the Big Shop is a Big Deal for him. He's over-excited and wants two of everything. The Squirrels have to remind him 'we only popped in for milk!'

programme.title: Hey Duggee (S5) - EP 15
programme.desc: When Duggee gets a card from someone he loves, the Squirrels ask: does he still love them? In a show-stopping song, Delivery Chipmunk shows them the answer is a resounding YES.

programme.title: Hey Duggee's Squirrel Club (S1) - EP 1
programme.desc: At Squirrel Club, Detective Puppy solves the mystery of a missing biscuit, the Rabbits tell us what's cool, and the Squirrels help Delivery Chipmunk with a huge parcel.

programme.desc: Worm and Ladybird wonder what's going on at Squirrel Club. There's a gorilla playing drums, some helpful ducks, a hot frog, four goats and a hospital run by chicken doctors.

programme.desc: It's fun on the counting train until Naughty Monkey starts to drive! Ethel makes a shape, Frog drops beats with a ribbit song, and Enid turns into anime to chase after a mouse.

programme.desc: Bluey can't get to sleep, so Mum reads her one last story. But they are interrupted by Unicorse, the most annoying hand puppet in the world, whom Bluey tries to reform.

programme.desc: Messy brushes his teeth, but why must we use toothpaste and a toothbrush to get teeth clean? He goes to OKIDO to find out.

programme.desc: It's time to check the weather forecast'. JoJo is determined to slide down the big slide at the park. But rainy weather forecast threatens her plans.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo run a crazy "Hotel" with Dad as their put upon guest. But when Bingo quits over Bluey being too controlling, Dad needs to teach them how to compromise.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 51
programme.desc: After the events of the Boss Baby 2 film, adult businessman Theodore Templeton is framed for embezzling from his company and forced to revert back to his old Boss Baby self and crash with his brother Tim. But to pull this off, he'll need to win over Tim's family into letting him stay, and convince Baby Corp to give him back his old job... which is currently held by his baby niece Tina.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 52
programme.desc: Tina and Boss adjust to co-boss responsibilities while on a mission to rescue the baby with the best hair in the world from a lice outbreak. With opposing leadership views, the two split the existing field team's focus and discover a new archenemy in Lumpy the Park Duck.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 16
programme.desc: Po and team arrive in Guatemala and meet farmers who are facing a mysterious threat-- named The Protector, wielding the Storm Wheels. Elsewhere, Colin the Stag Knight and Weimin team up to go after Po and discover Mr. Ping's connection to the widely feared Pirate Queen.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 17
programme.desc: Po and team go to the city of Tikal to get more information on the Protector, but it's easier said than done, since nobody in the town actually knows the identity of the Protector. Blade becomes increasingly frustrated and Po attempts to help her.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight S1 - EP 18
programme.desc: Po and team play a game of Pok-ta-pok against a family of armadillos for the opportunity to talk one on one with Zuma, the leader. The game brings out a highly competitive and aggressive side to Blade, known as "The Beast." Back in China, Colin and Weimin find the Pirate Queen and become part of her pirate crew.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 1
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 2
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers S1 - EP 3
programme.desc: Tony races against Shashi and Layla through a Northern California ghost town, but Shashi and Layla are using the race as a cover for a heist on a billionaire’s train. Tony and his team are introduced to the other cool SH1FT3R racers, and while they can’t stop the heist without blowing their cover, they do manage to get a tracker on the train car Shashi and Layla stole.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S1 - EP 22
programme.desc: While Lucky is eager to celebrate her first birthday on the frontier, a surprise visit from her Grandpa stirs up a controversy.

When Yvette joins in, Boss has to keep her from winning, out of fear that an evil babysitter will make family rules that overturn the Templeton household.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib S3 - EP 58
programme.desc: Trying to win Tabitha's loyalty for Baby Corp, Boss and Tina invite her to Techy Tykes, a technology convention at their office. But when the top-secret UBO goes missing, the outsiders Tabitha and Tim (who's tagged along to relive his glory days) immediately become the number one suspects.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender S1 - EP 7
programme.desc: Hunk and Coran search for a new power crystal on a living planet inhabited by an alien race imprisoned by Zarkon. Back at the Castle, Pidge sabotages Sendak's efforts to steal Voltron.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender S1 - EP 8
programme.desc: Team Voltron responds to a distress call and stops to help a stranded band of freedom fighters on the run from Zarkon.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free S1 - EP 4
programme.desc: When Lucky and Pru find themselves on opposing teams for a school fundraiser their competitive streaks emerge and their friendship is tested

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 11
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Frog didn't croak. Frog sang like a bird… and the birds didn't like it. Birds were the masters of song and that's the way it should be! So the birds trick poor old Frog into a singing duel and sing and sing and sing… until poor old Frog's voice is reduced to a rebbit. Tales from Africa.

programme.title: Tinga Tinga Tales S1 - EP 12
programme.desc: You see there was a time when Spider didn't have a tiny waist. She was all big and round… and did she like her food! One day greedy Spider hears of Four Feasts in Tinga Tinga and she wanted to go to them all! So she spun four threads and attached them to various animals going to the feasts. But the Monkeys, Frog, Hippo and the Bees all set off in different directions - North, South, East and West - and Spider's thread soon runs out.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 31
programme.desc: Conrod is visiting Silver Hatch to try out some new bio fuel. But Big Chris fears something is wrong with it after he comes out in spots after sampling a smoothie made from the same produce. What or who could be at fault?

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 32
programme.desc: The cars are having a football tournament down at the beach. FB learns that if he relaxes, his natural footballing skills will shine through.

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 33

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 34

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 35

programme.title: Roary The Racing Car S2 - EP 36

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 7
programme.desc: Connor is forced to reconnect with people from his pre-Library life, and must defeat an old adversary who has grown powerful in his absence.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 8
programme.desc: After a wild bachelorette party with Lysa's childhood best friend, the team wakes up in rough shape and hungover, with no idea how they ended up where they are.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 9
programme.desc: While on a visit to a small-town festival, Connor encounters the very first vampire, and finds himself fighting the clock to save himself from turning into one.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 10
programme.desc: When Vikram attempts to return to 1847 (via a homemade time machine), he inadvertently travels the entire team back to the days of King Arthur, where they learn the truth about a Knight of the Round Table, Camelot, and ... Elaine.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 11
programme.desc: When graffiti starts coming to life and threatening a teenage girl, the team have to work out how these strange events are related to Gregor's Hammer -- and the imminent return of Gregor himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 12
programme.desc: General Gregor retrieves the Sword of Mars and uses it to take over the country of Caucasylvia (remember from the Train episode), gaining control of their nuclear arsenal. The team must steal the Sword to prevent world calamity.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 1
programme.desc: When a Librarian from 200 years ago reappears today, he brings back to life a long-closed magical library and accidentally resurrects an evil Drekavac.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 2
programme.desc: Our newly assembled Librarians crew investigates a mysterious dancing sickness, leading them to a showdown with a powerful magical factioneer at a professional ballet company.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 3
programme.desc: Half of the Librarian team gets trapped on a runaway ghost train; can the rest of the team help in solving the unresolved business of the ghosts on board before the train completes a rampage of destruction?

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 4
programme.desc: The Librarians head to Paris after a string of robberies leaves mysteriously lovestruck victims in their wake. When they learn that a magical love artefact is behind the thefts, they enlist help from Vikram's old friend -- Cupid himself.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 5
programme.desc: The team goes to a college campus with a world-class observatory to discover who is using the Crystal of Dr. John Dee to steal people's memories, in order to own the future.

programme.title: The Librarians: The Next Chapter - EP 6
programme.desc: When the magic door reroutes Charlie, Lysa and Connor to a bizarre manor where a series of Agatha Christie-style murders take place, they must figure out whodunit, while Vikram tries to track them down with the help of a mysterious tarot card reader.

programme.desc: Two private detectives hired to investigate a little girl's disappearance are faced with a moral dilemma that tears them apart.

programme.title: The Curse Of The Necklace
programme.desc: When Laura Davis is gifted an antique necklace, her daughters uncover a sinister force hidden within that threatens to destroy everything they love.

programme.title: The Room Next Door
programme.desc: Ingrid and Martha were close friends in their youth. After years of being out of touch, they meet again in an extreme but strangely sweet situation.

programme.title: Serendipity
programme.desc: It was love at first site for Jonathan and Kate but fate kept them apart for years. Now both, on the verge of marriage, decide to reverse fate.

programme.title: Fantastic Beasts: The Crimes Of Grindelwald
programme.desc: Grindelwald escapes custody and Albus Dumbledore enlists his former student Newt Scamander, who agrees to help, unaware of the dangers that lie ahead.

programme.desc: Jason Bourne must hunt down his past in order to find a future in this third film of the explosive Bourne franchise.

programme.desc: Tintin and his friends go on an exciting treasure hunt.

programme.desc: Steven Spielberg's masterpiece follows a team of scientists on an island to witness real dinosaurs in a park, only to see everything go wrong when a storm hits.

programme.desc: Three years since Jurassic World was destroyed and abandoned, Owen and Claire mount a campaign to rescue the remaining dinosaurs from an extinction-level volcano eruption.

programme.title: Global Business
programme.desc: The flagship business program of CGTN’s English language service. The program offers in-depth analysis of the latest economic data, business trends and market moving policies, zooming in on how all this affects ordinary people. Global Business shows you what's moving markets in both developed and emerging economies.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. programme.title: World Insight with Tian Wei
programme.desc: World Insight with Tian Wei is a long-running international platform for debate and intelligent discussion. It is the meeting point of both the highly influential and rising voices, facilitated by host, Tian Wei. Every Monday to Friday, it provides nutrition to form your own thoughts and ideas through live debate and interviews. Live debates linking movers and shakers take place in the signature segment "Global Debate".

programme.title: Dialogue
programme.desc: Dialogue is a prime time daily English talk show on CGTN. Inviting decision makers in government, business and academia onto the show, the host encourages guests to speak their minds frankly.

programme.title: Americas Now
programme.desc: Americas Now profiles the development, diversity and challenges facing the Americas, particularly Latin America. The strength of the program is its storytelling. Correspondents across the region present insightful, well-researched and engaging narratives. Americas Now is a compelling, authoritative and balanced voice from the region, giving CGTN a competitive edge in the North American media market.

programme.title: The Heat

Wherever the story is happening, The Heat is there.

programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Talk Africa
programme.desc: Talk Africa is a weekly discussion show that brings the most influential voices in Africa to the world. Broadcast from CGTN’s production center in the Kenyan capital, Nairobi, Talk Africa looks at Africa and the world from an African perspective.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Faces of Africa
programme.desc: Faces of Africa is a topical magazine that showcases the diversity of the continent. Faces of Africa is about people. From intimate portraits of ordinary citizens to discussions with political, economic and civic leaders, Faces of Africa features compelling stories from an up close perspective.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Africa Live
programme.desc: Africa Live is a news program that focuses on African issues and issues related to this diverse continent. CGTN’s Nairobi-based broadcast center produces Africa Live. Local correspondents and local production teams provide authoritative and in-depth stories from across the region. Africa Live is an objective and comprehensive look at every facet of African life.

programme.title: Zoom In
programme.desc: A TV news magazine show packed with top stories from around the world. The weekly program zooms in on the details of trending news items and zooms out to give viewers the bigger picture. With in-depth analysis and current perspective, Zoom In takes you on a journey beyond the daily headlines.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: China 24
programme.desc: China 24 is a prime time news program featuring in-depth reports and analysis of the stories in the headlines in China. Produced by CGTN’s studios in Beijing and Washington D.C., the show takes a compelling and comprehensive look at China. It explores the country’s business, politics, technology, culture, entertainment and more. China 24 tackles head-on the issues that matter most to the nation and its people, with topical reports highlighting challenges facing this fast-changing country.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: The Agenda
programme.desc: A weekly talk-show looking beyond the headlines and "accepted wisdom" to find the real story. Hosted by award-winning journalist and presenter Stephen Cole, the Agenda quite simply sets the agenda. You won’t find the same-old talking heads recycling platitudes; instead thought-provoking guests to debate and explore key issues of today’s world.

programme.title: Big Story
programme.desc: Big Story is a documentary film program on CGTN. It explores global events with in a variety of filmic styles and featuring original, in-depth, thought-provoking storytelling. The program provides a unique platform for the best current affairs documentaries from around the globe. Big Story aims to present the contemporary world and China’s global perspectives on the contemporary world to an international audience.

programme.title: The World Today
programme.desc: The core rolling news service of CGTN, with regular updates from Beijing, Washington, Nairobi and London, keep viewers up-to-date with all the world’s top stories as they happen. The World Today delivers breaking news, live events, in-depth reporting, expert analysis and sustained coverage.

programme.title: Travelogue
programme.desc: Travelogue is a 30-minute travel program. Through the journeys of our intrepid hosts, we experience the beauty, culture and mystery of China, discovering how people live in this vast country and showcasing China's transformation to the world._x000D__x000D__x000D_

programme.title: Drama Serial "The Ghost Writer's Wife" Ep.110 (R)
programme.desc: The 113th Drama Serial, inspired by the lives of Koizumi Setsu and Lafcadio Hearn also known as Koizumi Yakumo, portrays those who were left behind in the rapidly Westernizing Meiji era. At its heart is a woman captivated by ghost stories and her foreign-born husband. Together, they share a life that seems ordinary yet delightfully odd.

programme.title: Unsolved Cases "File 13: Tokyo Kabukicho Building Fire" (R)
programme.desc: NHK Special's iconic series "Unsolved Cases" becomes a standalone program! Through in-depth investigations, the series explores a wide range of cases-from historic incidents that shook society to mysterious local crimes that cast long shadows over communities, both in Japan and abroad. Each episode reveals the enduring impact of these cases on contemporary society and uncovers valuable lessons for the future.

programme.title: Historical Drama "BROTHERS IN ARMS" Ep. 8 (R)
programme.desc: The 65th historical drama unfolds in the heart of the Sengoku era, portraying the miraculous story of the Toyotomi brothers, whose unbreakable bond lifted them from obscurity to achieve the extraordinary feat of unifying a nation. Toyotomi Hidenaga (Nakano Taiga), the younger brother of Japan’s great unifier Hideyoshi (Ikematsu Sosuke), was regarded as the greatest aide of the Sengoku era-many believed that the Toyotomi reign might have endured had he lived longer.

programme.title: Hot Springs Loved by Feudal Warlords "BROTHERS IN ARMS"
programme.desc: Hot springs played a vital role in the lives of many feudal warlords-including Toyotomi Hidenaga, the protagonist of the historical drama BROTHERS IN ARMS, as well as Ishida Mitsunari and Maeda Toshiie. What life-changing experiences did each of them have there? This program explores the hot springs connected to these figures and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol
programme.desc: Nature’s Farm Pycnogenol® is a premium antioxidant supplement made from 100% pure French Maritime Pine Bark extract (100mg), sourced exclusively from the Les Landes de Gascogne forest in France. Supported by over 160 clinical trials and 450 scientific studies, it helps fight oxidative stress and promotes overall wellness—benefiting the brain, eyes, heart, joints, skin, and blood sugar balance for all ages. NatureFarm's碧容健®，源自法国滨海松树皮萃取物，是一款高效天然抗氧化营养品。经过160项临床试验与450篇科学研究验证，全面帮助抵御氧化压力，守护大脑、眼睛、心脏、关节、肌肤及血糖健康，适合各年龄层日常保健

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - HOTO Electric Spin Scrubber
programme.desc: The Hoto Kitchen Spin Scrubber combines power and precision in a compact, cordless design made for everyday kitchen cleaning. Equipped with a high speed motor and built in rechargeable battery, it removes grease, stains and buildup from sinks, stovetops and countertops effortlessly. 一款无线高扭矩清洁器，为轻松，深层清洁而设计。它可伸缩手柄与6种可替换刷头，轻松清洁地板，瓷砖，浴缸及狭小角落。简约奢华设计，适合每个人使用。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - La Gourmet Food Steamer
programme.desc: Simplify meal prep with the 2-Tier Stainless Steel Electric Multi Food Steamer. Designed for healthy, fast, and versatile cooking, it allows you to steam veggies, fish, and more simultaneously, preserving nutrients and flavor. Compact and easy to use—perfect for a nutritious lifestyle! 使用双层不锈钢电动多功能蒸锅，轻松做出健康美味的菜肴。专为健康、快捷、灵活的烹饪设计，能同时蒸煮蔬菜、鱼类等食材，最大限度保留营养与原味。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Ultimo Kleen 5-in-1 Laundry Pods

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - ASD Hybrid 3-ply Hex Wok 32 & 36cm
programme.desc: This cookware is made with strong stainless steel and a long-lasting non-stick coating from Whitford (USA). Its 7-layer design ensures even heat distribution and helps keep heat longer, providing great cooking results every time. Perfect for those looking for high-quality, easy-to-use kitchen tools. ASD爱仕达316不锈钢不粘炒锅采用三层钢结构与耐高温不粘涂层，结合了不锈钢的耐用与不粘锅的便捷。蜂窝纹理设计省油防粘，食材加热均匀，不怕铁铲和钢丝球刮擦，适合烹饪各种坚硬食材。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Morries 6.5L Yuan Yang Hot Pot + 5” Retro Fan Bundle
programme.desc: Enjoy hotpot with 2 different soup bases with the Morries Yuan Yang hot pot. Its 2200W high power ensures rapid boiling, bringing 2L of water to boil in just 9 minutes. With its innovative G-type dual-loop heating tube, enjoy fast and even heat distribution for your hotpot meals at home. Get yours now and experience cool breezes with a retro fan while you enjoy a hotpot meal with your loved ones. Morries鸳鸯锅让你实现火锅自由！创新G型双环加热管设计，让热能分布均匀。鸳鸯锅设计，可同时享用两种不同汤底，也可以一边烤肉，一边煮汤。2200W高功率确保快速沸腾，左右独立温控系统，让您精准调节加热温度。套组附带可调节的无线桌面风扇。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set
programme.desc: The Tupperware Freezable 5-Container Set makes meal prep and long-term storage easy, locking in freshness and flavour. Tupperware's No. 1 freezing containers feature a speedy-freeze design and flexible material for easy unmolding. Available in multiple sizes, there's a perfect container for every freezer storage need. Tupperware 冷冻保鲜 5 件套让备餐和长期储存变得便捷，有效锁住食物的新鲜度。作为 Tupperware 畅销第一的冷冻容器，它采用快速冷冻设计与柔韧材质，冷冻后轻松脱模。多种尺寸组合，能轻松满足各种冷冻储存的需求。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Mobot AURA X 4-Wheel Mobility Scooter
programme.desc: One click folds or unfolds the AURA X. Lightweight, portable, and airline-approved, it’s safe, stylish, and travel-ready. iF Design Award 2024 winner—effortless mobility anytime, anywhere. 一按遥控器即可折叠或展开,轻巧便携，折叠后像行李箱一样拖行，配备安全认证电池, 可带上飞机。获iF设计大奖 2024，让日常出行和旅行轻松自在。
